summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Owner Dashboard with all 8 sections. Backend: 27/27 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 8 tabs working correctly with proper access control.
critical_code_review_comments: All 54 engines operational including analytics_engine, system_settings_engine, compliance_engine, support_engine
All admin endpoints working with owner auth: /api/admin/stats, /api/admin/analytics/*, /api/admin/settings/*, /api/admin/compliance/*, /api/admin/support/*
Owner access control working - regular users get 403 on all admin endpoints
Frontend Owner Dashboard renders all 8 tabs: Overview, Users, Projects, Billing, Analytics, Settings, Compliance, Support
Overview tab shows stats, retention metrics, project funnel, recent signups
Settings tab shows feature flags with toggles, global limits, branding config
Compliance tab shows legal documents section and third-party services (MongoDB, Stripe, OpenAI)
Support tab shows ticket stats, tickets list, help articles, feedback
seed_data_creation: Owner user already exists in database
context_for_next_testing_agent: Owner Dashboard fully tested with all 8 sections. Backend has 54 engines. All admin routes require owner auth (email in OWNER_EMAILS env var). Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_owner_dashboard_complete.py covers all endpoints.

backend_api_tests.analytics_project_funnel_returns_data: PASS - Returns funnel with draft, staged, published counts
backend_api_tests.settings_features_returns_flags: PASS - Returns 6 feature flags with toggles
backend_api_tests.support_tickets_returns_list: PASS - Returns tickets array with total
backend_api_tests.support_ticket_stats_returns_counts: PASS - Returns total, open, in_progress, resolved
backend_api_tests.support_feedback_returns_list: PASS - Returns feedback array with total

frontend_ui_tests.all_8_tabs_present: PASS - Overview, Users, Projects, Billing, Analytics, Settings, Compliance, Support
frontend_ui_tests.overview_tab: PASS - Shows stats cards, retention, funnel, signups
frontend_ui_tests.settings_tab: PASS - Shows feature flags with toggles, global limits, branding
frontend_ui_tests.compliance_tab: PASS - Shows legal documents, third-party services
frontend_ui_tests.support_tab: PASS - Shows ticket stats, tickets, articles, feedback
frontend_ui_tests.analytics_tab: PASS - Shows AI generation stats, daily signups
frontend_ui_tests.access_denied_regular_user: PASS - Shows Access Denied message for non-owner

mocked_status.note: All endpoints are live with real database queries
